productDisplayName: Jockey MC Men White Midway Classic Boxer Trunks 1101
description: Style Note Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this modern classic innerwear - the boxer brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort and the design ensures there's no see-through lines, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort while the fly construction offers maximum ease of use. Product Details White midway classic boxer brief, has multi panel styling for optimum support, unique leg treatment which eliminates the fabric from riding up, comfort design pouch with a no-gap fly and new high-tech cushioned waistband for smooth comfortable grip with branding Material and Care 100% combed cotton Machine wash Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
